meta.title: How To Measure Anything in Cybersecurity Risk
meta.description:
Author Richard Seiersen makes the case that quantitative methods can be used to measure cybersecurity risk in a useful way ... even when there is very limited data, such as the case in ICS.

He gives a number of examples in this fast paced presentation related to the book by the same name.
